description: A nutritious and quick salad made with bulgur, chickpeas, cherry tomatoes, red onion, and basil.
ingredients: [{"name": "Bulgur", "amount": 1, "unit": "cup"}, {"name": "Water", "amount": 2, "unit": "cups"}, {"name": "Honey", "amount": 2, "unit": "tablespoons"}, {"name": "Nuts", "amount": "a handful", "unit": null}, {"name": "Canned Chickpeas", "amount": 1, "unit": "can"}, {"name": "Cherry Tomatoes", "amount": 1, "unit": "cup"}, {"name": "Red Onion", "amount": 1, "unit": null}, {"name": "Basil", "amount": "to taste", "unit": null}, {"name": "Olive Oil", "amount": "to taste", "unit": null}, {"name": "Vinegar", "amount": "to taste", "unit": null}, {"name": "Salt", "amount": "to taste", "unit": null}]
instructions: 1. Cook bulgur according to package instructions. 2. Mix cooked bulgur with canned chickpeas, cherry tomatoes, red onion, and basil. 3. Add dressing made from olive oil, vinegar, and salt.
notes: You can add other vegetables or proteins as desired.
